name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Fasten OnPrem

labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing the feature. -->

## Problem / motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who is affected, and how does it help a
     self-hosted personal/family health record user? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like to happen. Mock-ups, screenshots, or example UI welcome. -->

## FHIR / data considerations

<!-- If this touches imported data: which FHIR resource type(s)? Is the data
     US-Core conformant, or a non-US-Core export (e.g. Veradigm/FollowMyHealth)?
     Paste a small *synthetic* example if helpful — never real patient data. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about, and why you prefer this one. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Links, related issues, or anything else. -->
